summary: Nice indoor audience recording with solid sound, though only a single set is available.
review: The audience (AUD) capture from the 1981 auditorium delivers surprisingly clear and pleasant audio for its era, earning a respectable four‑star rating. Reviewers note the lack of both sets on the stream as a drawback, but overall the performance sounds good enough to recommend.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it praises sound quality (positive) but mentions missing second set (negative). Combined impression yields a solid 4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very nice indoor sound for an AUD recording from 1981; clear enough to be enjoyable despite typical audience ambience.
